fixture: 051_missing_relations

statement 1:
  sql:
    SELECT * FROM missing
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:15 (offset 14): table "public.missing" does not exist
      [1] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42703] at 1:8 (offset 7): cannot resolve * without a FROM source

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO missing VALUES (1)
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:13 (offset 12): table "public.missing" does not exist

statement 3:
  sql:
    UPDATE missing SET id = 1
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:8 (offset 7): table "public.missing" does not exist

statement 4:
  sql:
    DELETE FROM missing
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:13 (offset 12): table "public.missing" does not exist

statement 5:
  sql:
    DROP TABLE missing
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42P01] at 1:12 (offset 11): table "public.missing" does not exist
